svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="future-roadmap" name="Remaining Plan"> <mxGraphModel dx="-784" dy="-214" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="current" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1" value="已落地基线（来自 current-as-is）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="650" width="330" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="base" parent="current" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf" value="Nuxt / Nitro API
Auth、Photo、Article、AI、Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="270" x="30" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="security" parent="current" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6" value="安全基线
Refresh Session / TOTP / 恢复码
权限、审计、配额、IP 限流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="270" x="30" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data" parent="current" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="SQLite + Prisma
AI 会话已持久化
备份、迁移、回滚镜像" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="270" x="30" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy" parent="current" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00" value="ECS 生产
Nginx / Docker / FRP
磁盘已清理至约 42%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="270" x="30" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1" value="P3：质量与可观测性（优先）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="650" width="350" x="410" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tests" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656" value="自动化测试补齐
Auth / Photo Review / 配额并发
AI ownership / API 回归 / E2E" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="30" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ops" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656" value="Jobs 运维面板
详情、重试、取消、失败原因
统一任务状态与审计" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="30" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656" value="Storage 一致性运维
孤儿文件扫描、缩略图重建
清理前审计与恢复演练" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="30" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="observe" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656" value="监控与告警
ECS 磁盘、内存、备份新鲜度
登录失败、队列积压" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="290" x="30" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1" value="P4：产品与安全完善" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="650" width="350" x="810" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aichat" parent="p4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450" value="AI 会话管理
列表 / 详情 / 删除 / 归档
分页、权限与数据保留策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="30" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="totp" parent="p4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450" value="2FA 生命周期 UI
恢复码重新生成/撤销
安全事件与设备管理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="290" x="30" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="retention" parent="p4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450" value="发布与数据保留自动化
保留最新 N 个 release
一份 rollback、日志轮转、备份策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="290" x="30" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="review" parent="p4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450" value="架构校准闭环
每次迁移同步 current-as-is
代码、部署、文档三方核对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="290" x="30" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="done" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1" value="完成定义
测试门禁通过 + 生产演练完成
架构图与实现无已知漂移" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="1210" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="base" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="tests" value="基线"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="storage" value="数据边界"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="security" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="totp" value="安全回归"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="tests" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="aichat" value="P3 完成后"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ops" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="retention" value="运维闭环"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="aichat" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="done" value="可验收"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="retention" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="done" value="可验收"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="review" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1" target="done" value="持续同步"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
